title: CNFAIC Staff gears up for the season – update
summary: The mountains are getting whiter and that means the CNFAIC is getting ready for another fantastic winter season! The Avalanche Center will begin issuing intermittent snow, weather and avalanche updates as conditions warrant through mid-November. Daily avalanche forecasts are planned to begin during...

title: Lakota John
summary: October 19, 2020 “Pembroke’s Lakota John Locklear is a prodigious blues guitarist of Lumbee and Lakota lineage.” – Indy Week. Lakota John is an old soul with a love for music. He is a talented guitarist/vocalist, from Southeastern North Carolina, who grew up listening to his dad’s music library. At 6 years old he picked up harmon...
